metadata.title:
ESQ BILLS INTRODUCED


IN STATE LEGISLATURE

The Big Fight of Week viii Probably Be on the


Commission Bill Wednesday.

pages.raw_text:
Today the yesterday antitrust bill
comes up again in the house. and the
lumbermen are making another fight
against It,


The railroad commission bill will
be reached tomorrow, if not this
afternoon, on its second reading.


The sentiment toward dividing the
state into three congressional dis
tricts Is growing stronger. though
lack of harmony may prevent the
passage of the apportionment bill.


The special committee investigat-
ing the charge of collision and fraud
in connection with the state printing
contracts has held several sessions
and taken much testimony. but de-
veloped nothing of a sensational ma
ture.


1t is said. however that the COM
mittee has become convinced that
there was collision among the bidders
to prevent competition.
